title: No CPvP Sounds
description:
No CPvP Sounds is a lightweight, client-side resource pack for Minecraft 1.21.4 designed for Crystal PvP.

It removes the following sounds:

Totem pop sound

End crystal explosion sound

Respawn anchor explosion sound
body: This is a resource pack that is very useful CPvPers.This resource pack removes the loud crystal explosion, Anchor explosion and the totem pop sound.This resource pack is supported with 1.21.4 version.
